name: ninety
description: Tu diario futbolero — guarda y revive todos los partidos que has visto

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix backend && npm run typecheck --prefix frontend
scripts.seed:demo: npm run generate:test-photos --prefix backend && npm run seed:demo --prefix backend
